RT by @lookner: Haalvsh reports that an attack on Iran's 388th Mechanized Infantry Brigade in Bampur killed and wounded dozens of military personnel. According to local sources cited by the outlet, at least 10 ambulances entered the base after the strikes, security was tightened, and families were barred from approaching. The casualty figures and details have not been independently verified, and Iranian authorities have not issued an official statement.
